summary: Frontend-only testing completed for Mobile UI bug fixes. All reported issues verified as FIXED: 1) Payment History page loads correctly for logged-in customers, 2) Admin Partner Credit stats cards display full text labels on mobile (single column layout), 3) Admin Car Advertising tab loads data without persistent loading indicator, 4) Daily Login Popup correctly excluded from /admin, /developers, and /zahlungen pages.

payment_history_page.details: Page loads correctly with title 'Zahlungsverlauf', stats cards (Ausgaben gesamt, Diesen Monat, Transaktionen), transaction list with status badges, filter chips, and search functionality

admin_partner_credit_tab.details: Stats cards now use single column layout on mobile (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3), text labels fully visible without truncation, responsive text sizes applied

admin_car_advertising_tab.details: Data loads successfully without persistent loading indicator, stats cards display correctly (Gesamt, Ausstehend, Genehmigt, Aktiv, Abgelehnt, Ausgezahlt), filter buttons functional

daily_login_popup_exclusion.details: Daily Login Popup correctly NOT appearing on excluded pages as per App.js lines 270-290

App.js_popup_exclusion.details: /admin and /developers added to exclusion list alongside /zahlungen and /payment-history

AdminPartnerCredit.js_mobile_layout.details: Changed from 2-column to single column on mobile (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3), removed truncate class, added responsive text sizes

AdminCarAdvertising.js_loading_state.details: Loading state properly managed with setLoading(false) in finally block

context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile UI bugs reported by user have been verified as fixed. Payment History page works for customers, Admin Panel Partner Credit and Car Advertising tabs display correctly on mobile viewport (390x844), Daily Login Popup is properly excluded from /admin, /developers, and /zahlungen pages.
